name: M:GTA.Native.Function.Call``1(GTA.Native.Hash,GTA.Native.InputArgument)
summary: Calls the specified native script function and ignores its return value.
returns: The return value of the native.

params.name: hash
params.description: The hashed name of the script function.

params.name: argument
params.description: The input or output argument to pass to the native script function.
